message:
fix(render,extras): add CellAttrs::merged_flags and fix style merging in forms

Add CellAttrs::merged_flags() to OR new style flags on top of existing
ones without clearing, complementing the existing with_flags() which
replaces. This method is used by apply_style/set_style_area in
ftui-widgets (already committed) and now also in ftui-extras::forms.

Fix ftui-extras::forms local apply_style() to:
- Use alpha-aware bg compositing (Porter-Duff SourceOver) instead of
  unconditional replacement, matching ftui-widgets behavior
- Use merged_flags() for attribute OR-merge instead of with_flags()

These changes ensure selection/highlight overlays that only set a
background color correctly preserve per-cell foreground colors and
existing text attributes (bold, italic, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
